programme.title: The Bug Scream
programme.desc: Host JB Smoove welcomes Emmy winner and social media sensation Tabitha Brown, Ring Doorbell creator Jamie Siminoff, and Amazon executive Michelle Rothman to hear pitches from 4 entrepreneurs. A slay-ing beauty tool, the daddy of all cleaning appliances, a fashion item that fits the bill, and a quirky home tool compete for a spot in Amazon's exclusive Buy It Now Store and the chance to win $20,000.

programme.title: Turning Up The Spice
programme.desc: Host JB Smoove welcomes comedian and AC Barbeque founder Anthony Anderson, Ring Doorbell creator Jamie Siminoff, and Amazon executive Tanner Elton to hear pitches from 4 entrepreneurs. A tech device for the urban commuter, a revolutionary kitchen tool, a royal food item, and an explosively fun kids product compete for a spot in Amazon's exclusive Buy It Now Store and the chance to win $20,000.

programme.title: JB Gets Stuck in the Middle Seat
programme.desc: Host JB Smoove welcomes fashion mogul Christian Siriano, Ring Doorbell creator Jamie Siminoff, and Amazon executive Carmen Nestares to hear pitches from 5 different entrepreneurs. A retro tech device, a curious travel accessory, a sweet new food, an Al- powered beauty tool, and a lifetime cleaning product compete for a spot in Amazon's exclusive Buy It Now Store and the chance to win $20,000.

programme.title: It’s an Abbondanza!
programme.desc: After a surprising test with no elimination, 6 cooks still remain. This week, the Task is to create, style and photograph a gift basket with a unique flavor profile. The winner gets a secret advantage! Next, we're going around the world in the Test with three-dish cuisine-themed food towers. Comedian Punkie Johnson guests.

programme.title: I’m on a Boat!
programme.desc: We’re down to the Final Five and the competition is fierce. This time, the cooks are going on a field trip! After spending a wonderful morning at Island Creek, the cooks must prepare two cooked oyster dishes in the Task Challenge. For the Test Challenge, the cooks are asked to impress guest judge Vivian Tu with their use of expensive ingredients and fine dining cuisine skills.

programme.title: Put Everything on the Table
programme.desc: Today in the Test Kitchen, the final four cooks have four hours to put together a cohesive, three-course meal. The catch: they must include one affordable cut of meat. Guest Richard Blais joins judges Dan Souza, Jack Bishop, and Elle Simone Scott in deciding which three cooks will make it to the finale, and who will be saying goodbye to the Test Kitchen for the final time.

programme.title: The Final Interview
programme.desc: It all comes down to this. The three remaining cooks must impress the judges as they prepare two dishes that represent their cookbook’s theme. Then, they produce a photo shoot of their dishes before doing a live 7-minute demo alongside Julia on the ATK stage. Finally, our cooks must pitch the judges why they should join the ATK team. In the end, one winner is crowned!

programme.title: Weekend Deals with MBE
programme.desc: Join Joe from MBE to discover some of the best deals happening this weekend for your Home, Fashion and Outdoor needs. Shop while you watch: just head to the Amazon shopping app on mobile and type "Shop the Show" in the search bar!

programme.title: Country Glitz and Glam
programme.desc: Clinton and Stacy meet Naomi, former Amish and ex-stripper, who is seeking help after reverting to traditional Amish dress to hide her post-pregnancy body. Now back on the farm and raising a toddler, she yearns for the confidence she felt during her stripper days. Clinton and Stacy help Naomi find a style that both reclaims her femininity and balances her life as a new mom with a country heart.

programme.title: Masculine Avant-Garde
programme.desc: Clinton and Stacy meet Maurice, a larger-than-life baker and devoted single dad ready to elevate his style to prepare for the opening of his new storefront. Needing a look to represent his brand, Maurice turns to Clinton and Stacy for help in creating a “masculine avant-garde” look that embodies his vibrant personality and commands respect as a successful business owner.

programme.title: 90s Preppy
programme.desc: Clinton and Stacy welcome Selena, a goth content creator seeking a dramatic style transformation. Having worn an all-black aesthetic since middle school, Selena realizes that it hinders her ability to connect with others and looks for guidance to uncover a more approachable style that reflects her evolving identity.

programme.title: The First Police Interview

programme.title: Extending Her Interview
programme.desc: The candid yet unedited police interview Melody Farris initially gave was played nack in full. According to Lead Detective Daniel Hayes, the defendant kept talking.

programme.title: Blaming The Sons
programme.desc: In her police Interview, Melody Farris was heard raising suspicion to her two sons, Chris and Scott, in their alleged role in her husband's death. Jurors listened to her account in the days and hours leading up to her Gary's murder.

programme.title: Melody Farris, The Victim
programme.desc: Melody Farris was heard divulging more details in her extended police-recorded Interview. She sat down with detectives just after Gary's remains were discovered in a burn pile on his family's estate.

programme.title: The Second Police Interveiew
programme.desc: Just days after Gary Farris' remains were found in a burn pile, investigators interviewed all his family members. It was all recorded and played back for all to hear in the courtroom.

programme.title: Defendant Gives Police Clues
programme.desc: The second police interview law enforcement conducted of Melody Farris was played back.

programme.title: Detectives Push Back On Melody
programme.desc: In Melody Farris' second police Interview, she finally came clean about her extramarital affair with her longtime lover, Rusty Barton.

programme.title: Fonseca & Vicente Garcia
programme.desc:
A Tiny Audience is a music/talk-show recorded live in front of a "tiny audience" of dedicated fans in a very intimate setting. Musicians of all ages and genres perform completely organic, reaching the broadest possible audience. Musical artists get to speak about themselves, their songwriting, and their music. They get to show that they are real musicians, who can really perform their music without auto tune, tracks or choreography. The artists perform without rehearsal and go straight to the edge of their comfort zone. Most of the musicians have never performed this intimately in front of an audience they can look in the eyes, which is both intimidating and exhilarating. They are interviewed by hosts who are musicians themselves. The audience of fans, friends and family, management, and record labels gets closer to the artists, and the artists become more real than ever before. The result is a unique interaction between the musicians, hosts, and audience.
In each episode, the artists reveal things not know about them and their music. The shows open with a confession - something the audience will not know or believe about the artist. They then perform 3 songs: their biggest hit, the song they feel is their most important one, and a never-before performed acoustic version of a new song, a duet, or the cover they have always wanted to perform. Between songs, the artists discuss their creative process, important events in their lives, experiences, and their musical passion, and the audience (both present and at home) sees them like never before.

programme.title: MeatEater - First Timers: Montana Mule Deer Part 1
programme.desc: Television personality Joe Rogan and his best friend, comedian Bryan Callen, join Steven Rinella for their very first hunt. On a float trip for mule deer through the rugged Missouri Breaks, this is as adventurous of a first hunt as anyone could hope for, and Steve's special guests are in for a memorable experience and delicious wild game field cooking in some gorgeous country.

programme.title: MeatEater - First Timers: Montana Mule Deer Part 2
programme.desc: Television personality Joe Rogan and his best friend, comedian Bryan Callen, join Steven Rinella for their very first hunt. On a float trip for mule deer through the rugged Missouri Breaks, this is as adventurous of a first hunt as anyone could hope for, and Steve's special guests are in for a memorable experience and delicious wild game field cooking in some gorgeous country.

programme.title: MeatEater - Swamp Stew: Michigan Bowfishing
programme.desc: Steven Rinella returns to his cherished boyhood stomping grounds along Michigans Muskegon River.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Wide Open: New Mexico Antelope
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and friend Cody Lujan head to Northeastern New Mexico to hunt pronghorn antelope, the fastest big game animal in the United States. In the wide open desert plains, Steve will have to work hard to stalk within range of a mature buck. The payoff will be antelope loin topped with local New Mexico chiles.

programme.title: MeatEater - Primal Cuts: Bone-in Cooking Special
programme.desc: In this cooking special, Steven Rinella shows his fans some of his favorite preparations for big, bone-in cuts of red meat. Interspersed with highlights from his recent caribou, buffalo, and mule deer hunts, the show features recipes that utilize some of the most underappreciated parts of big game animals. This episode is an attractive and delicious tribute to Steve's gun-to-table ethic.

programme.title: MeatEater - El Venado Blanco: Mexico Coues Deer
programme.desc: Steven Rinella returns to his favorite hunting grounds of Sonora, Mexico to hunt for a Coues deer buck during the peak rutting season. Steve sets up camp and spends days glassing mountains and canyons for these elusive, wary desert whitetails. Meanwhile, his hunting partner, Remi Warren, attempts the difficult task of stalking one with a bow. To cap off the hunt, Steve cooks a batch of venison ribs braised in a Dutch oven buried beneath hot coals.

programme.title: MeatEater - Clash of the Titans: Northern California Pig & Deer
programme.desc: In this episode, Steven Rinella joins forces with fellow hunter and wild game chef Hank Shaw in the hills of Central California to go after Columbia blacktail deer, wild pigs, and a handful of small game species that are in season. The end result is a culinary smorgasbord of epic proportions.

programme.title: MeatEater - Sea Bear: Alaska Spring Bear and Seafood
programme.desc: Steve ventures out to his hunting and fishing shack on a remote coastline of southeast Alaska's Prince of Wales Island. While hunting bears from a skiff and a canoe, Steve gathers a variety of prime seafood and makes a discovery about his own motivations as a bear hunter.

programme.title: MeatEater - Full Boar: Whole Hog Cooking Special
programme.desc: Steven Rinella breaks down an entire boar and shares some of his favorite recipes in this Cooking Special. Matt Weingarter helps steve make head cheese, pork skin cracklins, smoked pork butt, and a tied-roast boned-out ham. Each dish requires thoughtful butchering, processing, and cooking to execute to perfection.

programme.title: MeatEater - Bull by Boat: British Columbia Moose
programme.desc: Steve and his buddy Ryan Callaghan float a remote river on a bull moose hunt.

programme.title: MeatEater - Local Motion: Montana Bull Elk
programme.desc: Steve must deal with bad weather and fierce competition during a late-season central Montana elk hunt.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Northern Rockies: British Columbia Grizzly Part 1
programme.desc: Steve and his buddy Ryan Callaghan, a British Columbia guide, hike into the steep backcountry of northern British Columbia in search of grizzlies and black bears. Among the beutiful alpine vista, this adventure includes some intense and up-close bear action ‚Äì almost too close.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Northern Rockies: British Columbia Grizzly Part 2
programme.desc: Steve and his buddy Ryan Callaghan, a British Columbia guide, hike into the steep backcountry of northern British Columbia in search of grizzlies and black bears. Among the beutiful alpine vista, this adventure includes some intense and up-close bear action ‚Äì almost too close.

programme.title: MeatEater - Opening Day: Wisconsin Whitetail Deer Part 1
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and his buddy Doug Duren give comedians Joe Rogan and Bryan Callen their first taste.

programme.title: MeatEater - Opening Day: Wisconsin Whitetail Deer Part 2
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and his buddy Doug Duren hunt with Joe Rogan.

programme.title: MeatEater - Spring Break: Florida Osceola Turkey
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and his friend and wild turkey specialist, Robert Abernathy, head to southern Florida to hunt.

programme.title: MeatEater - Boone and Bugles: Kentucky Bull Elk
programme.desc: Steven Rinella is invited by the Rocky Mountain Elk Foundation for a special opportunity to hunt elk during the rut in the mountainous coal country of southeastern Kentucky, a place where his hero Daniel Boone once roamed. This is Steve's first eastern elk hunt, and he quickly realizes that the rules of the game here are different. If he manages to track one down, he'll prepare what was supposedly Boone's favorite meal: elk liver.

programme.title: MeatEater - Cold Water: Alaskan Seafood Cooking Special
programme.desc: Join Steve on this Cooking Special as he dives into the best of Alaskan seafood, featuring shrimp, crab, fish, and clams. Learn how to make easy, delicious seafood recipes that showcase the fresh flavors of the sea. Whether you're a seasoned cook or a beginner, Steve's simple steps will help you prepare mouthwatering dishes that capture the essence of Alaskan waters.

programme.title: MeatEater - Big Buck Dreams: Colorado Mule Deer
programme.desc: Steve's annual quest for a giant mule deer buck continues this year in southwest Colorado. Here, Steve fills us in on his favorite critter, the mule deer. As he hunts will share his vast knowledge about these special western game animals including how to hunt, butcher, and most importantly how cook them-if he can put his tag on one.

programme.title: MeatEater - Surf N Turk: Wisconsin Turkey and Carp
programme.desc: Steven Rinella scratches his spring turkey itch this year as he visits Southeast Wisconsin to call in some big eastern Toms with his buddy Jerod Fink. The guys also plan to do some bow fishing after dark so they can enjoy a real Midwest turkey and fish fry.

programme.title: Coaching para vecinos
programme.desc: Luego de varios problemas vecinales, deciden traer un coach al edificio para sanar sus relaciones conflictivas.

programme.title: Acapulco en la azotea
programme.desc: Don Hipólito recibe un filtro de agua, pero Germán termina arruinando la instalación. Además, Magdalena se va de vacaciones, pero su destino no es tan lujoso como dice.

programme.title: Cena en París
programme.desc: Hipólito se reencuentra con un viejo amor y deciden cumplir la promesa que se hicieron hace muchos años. Frankie le cuenta sus historias de vida al Calaco.

programme.title: La peli de Frankie
programme.desc: Frankie searches among his neighbors for inspiration for the characters in his new movie. Additionally, Roco and Alejandra find out that Morris won a scholarship.

programme.title: La jubilación de Arturo y Chabelo
programme.desc: Arturo le cuenta a su familia que por fin podrá jubilarse y tendrán un dinero extra. Mientras tanto, los demás vecinos se reúnen para ver En familia con Chabelo.

programme.title: La estética de Lorena
programme.desc: Lorena tiene dificultades económicas y por eso decide abrir una estética que termina arruinando el cabello de sus clientes.

programme.title: Diva en el edificio
programme.desc: Los vecinos compiten en una trivia de televisión para que Lucía Méndez pase una tarde con ellos. Además, Silvia y Luis descubren que posiblemente esperen otro hijo.

programme.title: El sueño de Rocko
programme.desc: Rocko sueña con tener un grupo de rock llamado Los Moridos y empieza reunir a otros integrantes. Mientras, Jorjais decide mejorar su carrito para incrementar sus propinas.

programme.title: Basura en la escalera
programme.desc: Uno de los vecinos deja su basura en las escaleras, por lo que Luisito quiere encontrar al culpable. Además, Silvia hace de todo para ayudar a su sobrina a buscar empleo.

programme.title: La reina del Pik Pok
programme.desc: Erika Buenfil acude a la colonia para encontrar a nuevos talentos, pero termina conociendo a los vecinos. Además, don Hipólito tiene un nuevo trabajo para Germán.

programme.title: Cumpleaños de Luisito Junior
programme.desc: Es el cumpleaños de Luisito Jr. y Silvia se dispone a realizar una fiesta en privado. Sin embargo, los vecinos descubren el festejo y arman una celebración en grande.

programme.title: Bonita familia
programme.desc: Pedro pierde a Rambo en el póker con El Pechugo y Cris intenta recuperarlo. La familia Rivers recibe una mala noticia que tiene que ver con Don Lorenzo.

programme.title: Elote el guajolote
programme.desc: Vanesa recibe la visita de un inspector de seguridad en su clínica para cerciorarse de que todo esté en orden. Además, los vecinos aconsejan a Germán para conquistar a Virginia.

programme.title: Nos cayeron los chahuiztles
programme.desc: Casimiro Pérez, el hermano de Magda llega de visita. Además, la madrastra de Lorena le trae una noticia que cambiará su situación económica.

programme.title: Adopción
programme.desc: Cris shows Pedro the adoption application but they will receive a visit from the social worker. Germán, on the other hand, will be pruning the trees outside the building, without imagining the problems that this would bring.

programme.title: Buzón de quejas
programme.desc: Los problemas en el edificio revivieron un buzón de quejas que ya estaba olvidado, pero este buzón traerá problemas a Luis y Silvia. Por otro lado Morris esta a punto de reprobar el año.

programme.title: Can guash
programme.desc: Pedro se aterra por la llegada de su suegro pues tiene miedo de que no se lleven bien, además Germán y Vanessa emprenden un nuevo negocio.

programme.title: Oficinas de gobierno
programme.desc: Los vecinos aprovechan la apertura de unas nuevas oficinas de gobierno para emprender sus negocios y obtener algo de dinero, pero cuando Luis los descubre, intentará correrlos de la entrada del edificio.

programme.title: Llegada de Martina
programme.desc: Cris y Pablo están esperando a su hija Martina y, nerviosos por conocerla, preparan todo para recibirla. Por otro lado, Liz y Vanesa abren su tienda de ropa virtual y logran hacer un trato con Don Arturo.

programme.title: El gorrión de la canción
programme.desc: Dulce arrives at the building looking for the author of some songs to compose a new single for her. Also, Luis and Silvia meet the parents of one of their son's classmates.

programme.title: Sortilegio
programme.desc: Alejandro returns home after a terrible accident to discover that he is married to Maria Jose, a poor, innocent girl who was deceived by Alejandro's brother Bruno. Bruno used Alejandro's name to marry Maria Jose, soon after he sent to kill his brother in hopes that Maria Jose would inherit Alejandro's fortune. But when Maria Jose arrives at the mansion she realizes that Bruno lied to her and used her. She is also scared when Alejandro is found alive and returns home. Doctors tell Alejandro that he suffers from memory loss but he is convinced he never met Maria Jose before and goes in search of the truth, but during this time and Maria Jose actually fall in love, while Bruno and Maura (Alejandro's ex-girlfriend) plot to break them up. Meanwhile, the brothers' mother Victoria has fallen in love with Fernando--Alejandro's best friend, so closer to his age than hers.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Six teenagers with different lives and personalities attend a prominent private school with only one thing in common: their vocation and passion for music.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Six teenagers with different lives and personalities attend a prominent private school with only one thing in common: their vocation and passion for music.

programme.title: Capítulo 2
programme.desc: Roberta tries to thwart her admission. Miguel has trouble getting in to take the admission test. Thanks to her aunt, Lupita will attend school.

programme.title: Capítulo 3
programme.desc: Lupita's aunt helps Miguel get in to take the test and in exchange asks him to look after her niece. Miguel meets Mía and there's a mutual attraction.

programme.title: Capítulo 4
programme.desc: For Celina's sake, Mía pretends not to like Miguel. In Valle de Bravo, Roberta pretends to be drowning to get Mauro's attention. Diego's assaulted then saved by Miguel.

programme.title: Capítulo 5
programme.desc: Diego's attackers make it as if he was mugged. Miguel saves him and conceals the truth. Later Miguel struggles with Mía and pushes her over a cliff.

programme.title: Capítulo 6
programme.desc: On the edge of the cliff, Miguel humiliates Mía for what she did to Celina. Mía decides to hide what happened with Miguel and apologizes to Celina. Diego's father finds out about the mugging.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Six teenagers with different lives and personalities attend a prominent private school with only one thing in common: their vocation and passion for music.

programme.title: Capítulo 8
programme.desc: Miguel asks Celina to be his girlfriend. Diego and Roberta are on a collision course. Everyone thinks Roberta's been writing the anonymous notes.
